reliability.what_to_evidence: Adapter/source outage rates are low enough that the lane is not dominated by failures during the pre-audit window.

freshness.what_to_evidence: Evidence items carry timestamps that can be evaluated as fresh vs stale using a documented freshness window.

normalization_viability.what_to_evidence: Raw lane events can be normalized into `normalized_signal_event` without silent drops.

stale_outage_behavior.what_to_evidence: When the lane is stale/unavailable, the system behavior is explicit (downgrade confidence or escalate per policy) without fabricating values.

conflict_handling.what_to_evidence: Conflicting lane evidence is handled without corrupting direction models or forcing context-only data to override primary truth.

context_dominance_risk.what_to_evidence: Research Swarm context-only reads do not dominate or override primary lane truth.

lanes.notes: Candidate public/curated signal lane under deferred review; collect evidence per dimensions before any approval change.

Lane B evidence collection started (official/disclosure). Approval remains NOT granted; only preliminary checks are recorded. Stale/outage behavior, conflict handling, and context-dominance risk require additional evidence before the gate standard can be considered met.
Candidate market-context lane under deferred review; collect evidence per dimensions before any approval change.
Research Swarm is context-only in this gate; evidence focuses on non-domination and correct omission behavior, not on replacing primary lanes.

evidence_collection_rules.scope: Pre-approval evidence only. This registry does not grant MVP approval and must not be interpreted as an approval statement.
evidence_collection_rules.collection_window: Use the same pre-audit window assumed by `MVP_SOURCE_RELIABILITY_AUDIT.md` and record observations with timestamps and failure-mode details.

dimension_requirements.reliability: Record failure counts/outage observations sufficient to evaluate against `required_reliability_threshold` (0.8 in `mvp_lane_approval.json`).
dimension_requirements.freshness: Record observed evidence timestamps and classify fresh vs stale according to the gate freshness window (define the window in the log).
dimension_requirements.normalization_viability: Record normalization outcomes: success vs silent-drop indicators, tied to sample inputs.
dimension_requirements.stale_outage_behavior: Record explicit behavior on stale/unavailable conditions (downgrade/escalate/omit) with an example per lane.
dimension_requirements.conflict_handling: Record how conflicting evidence is resolved without letting context-only enrichment override primary truth.
dimension_requirements.context_dominance_risk: Record checks that context-only reads do not dominate primary lane truth.

notes: Created for Phase 2 / Tranche 3 to support operator evidence collection before any MVP lane approval change. Keep `approved:false` in `mvp_lane_approval.json` until evidence demonstrates the gate standard.
